pillars.name: cleanup
pillars.scope: enumerable regenerable junk reclaimed safely; dry-run-default; never touch source/committed/foreign

pillars.name: taskq
pillars.scope: making the 4-layer planning architecture an enforced, machine-checkable discipline rather than prose

pillars.name: bench
pillars.scope: trustworthy, reproducible, machine-judged regression verdicts; fast per-commit path; coverage that tracks the phase under development
pillars.status: bench compare — machine verdict + exit code, reproducible, in-repo [M] ✅ B1 SHIPPED 0726979+ (was: ad-hoc agent python). artifact_bytes hard gate + noise-aware run_ms; reproduced the prior hand-finding exactly
